use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING INSOMNIA CHARACTERIZED BY DIFFICULTY WITH SLEEP ONSET
METHOD OF TREATING A BIOLOGICAL RHYTHM DISORDER, SUCH AS INSOMNIA

indications.text:
ROZEREM is indicated for the treatment of insomnia characterized by difficulty with sleep onset.
The clinical trials performed in support of efficacy were up to six months in duration. The final
formal assessments of sleep latency were performed after two days of treatment during the
crossover study...
